Localization.Description: A user changed an object in Zabbix. This could be an attacker's attempt to disguise malicious activity, tools, or malware in the system or escalate privileges.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed application "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed host "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed detection rule "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed application configuration "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed service "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
